heading: Deputy Architect of the Capitol to serve as acting in case of absence, disability, or vacancy
label: 1805a Deputy Architect of the Capitol to serve as acting in case of absence, disability, or vacancy
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (d) of repealed .section 5704 of Pub. L. 118–31section 5704 of Pub. L. 118–31section 1804 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Deputy Architect of the Capitol (in this section referred to as the “Deputy Architect”) shall act as Architect of the Capitol (in this section referred to as the “Architect”) if the Architect is absent or disabled or there is no Architect.

children.heading: Absence, disability, or vacancy in Office of Deputy Architect
children.label: b Absence, disability, or vacancy in Office of Deputy Architect

children.text: the end of the absence or disability of the Architect or the Deputy Architect; or
in the case of vacancies in both positions, an Architect has been appointed under .section 1801a(a) of this title

children.heading: Authority
children.label: c Authority
children.text: An officer serving as acting Architect under subsection (a) or (b) shall perform all the duties and exercise all the authorities of the Architect, including the authority to delegate the duties and authorities of the Architect in accordance with .section 1803 of this title
